storyboard.content: I have round, scaly, itchy patches on my trunk and arms that started small and are slowly spreading.
The patches are slightly raised with a reddish border and clearer skin in the middle.
The itching gets worse when I sweat and after showering.
The patches have been slowly spreading over the past 2 months.
The itching is moderate and disrupts my sleep and exercise routine, but there is no pain. It is also bothering me cosmetically.
I tried an over-the-counter antifungal cream but it has not helped much.
